leadText: Sand Rush (Japanese: すなかき Sand Paddle) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled. A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] There are no effects outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled. A Pokémon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI In the Sandstorm weather condition, it can use a move 2 times at once for only 1 PP. * When the Pokémon uses a move in the Sandstorm weather condition, it uses it 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use! * S MD The Pokémon isn't damaged by a sandstorm. During a sandstorm, it uses a move 2 times at once but only consumes PP for 1 use!
